---
title: ""
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

<h1 class="site-title">Publications</h1>

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(htmltools)

pubs <- read_csv("publications.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

pubs <- pubs |>
  filter(!is.na(Year), !is.na(Title), !is.na(Publication)) |>
  arrange(desc(Year))

years <- pubs |>
  pull(Year) |>
  unique()

tagList(
  div(
    class = "pub-timeline",

    lapply(years, function(y) {

      year_pubs <- pubs |>
        filter(Year == y)

      div(
        class = "pub-year",

        div(class = "pub-year-label", y),

        div(
          class = "pub-items",

          lapply(seq_len(nrow(year_pubs)), function(i) {

            link <- year_pubs$Link[i]
            title <- year_pubs$Title[i]
            journal <- year_pubs$Publication[i]

            tagList(
              p(
                class = "pub-title",
                if (!is.na(link) && link != "") {
                  a(href = link, title)
                } else {
                  title
                }
              ),

              p(
                class = "pub-journal",
                journal
              )
            )
          })
        )
      )
    })
  )
)
```
